en.value:
Provide training to franchisees on conducting RMAs, conduct/commission market surveys in/out of country, establish linkages with employment-supportive entities, conduct familiarization meetings/workshops with private sector associations, Chamber of Commerce, Implement training events with high employment potential.
Develop and update training manuals in line with NSTB skill standards. Develop curriculum guides and training manuals based on OSS Level 1 and elementary level.Support and encourgae trainees to take skill tests after completion of training.
Ensure that the technical training is conducted according to NSTB standards. Develop and implement psycho-social counselling strategy for all employment markets (Overseas, Indian and Nepalese market). Provide regular training and orientation to F-SKILL staff on PSA appraoch and modality. Implement HIV/AIDS awareness raising and sensitization packages for all training
Establish linkages with financial institutions. Disseminate the F-SKILL working modality. Conduct regular dialouge and follow up with potential loan providers. Support franchisees in establishing linkages with loan providers.
Develop and implement strategy to increase efficiency in monitoring. Define criteria to decide on whether a trade/occupations are replicable and follow agreed procedure.
Develop and implement marketing and acquisition strategy. Develop a roster of potential donors. Enter a regular dialogue with potential donors on employment oriented skills development and F-SKILL services. Use different means of regularly communicating F-SKILL developments and achievements. Develop alternative financing/pricing startegy (different from that of SDC).
Clearly communicate the added value the EF provides to donors and communicate it. Maintain regular dialogue through different means with donors and other potential contributors to the EF on employment-oriented skills training, policy etc. Support F-SKILL Pvt. Ltd in their efforts to facilitate loan access for course graduates.
GoN will be invited and encourged to take a lead role on the EF steering committee. EF enters maintains dialogue with Government of Nepal on employment oriented skills training, policy and related matters.
